message: Android preview now shows export progress and completion directly below the case or collection top bar. PDF, ZIP, long-image, original-image, and single-image folder exports write to a hidden temporary document and publish the final name only after every byte is copied, closed, and verified, preventing a user-visible final file from appearing as 0 B. Existing names advance to (1), (2), and so on without overwriting older exports, and interrupted temporary files are cleaned before the next export.
